title: Optimize task lifecycle and sync hotspots
summary: Reduce repeated coordination rebuild cost in lifecycle and sync integration tests while preserving at least one true rebuild path.
scope_items: Bypass or collapse redundant full sync work in tests that assert mutation, gating, or payload behavior rather than sync outputs.
Retain explicit integration coverage for one real lifecycle and one real closeout or query rebuild path.
done_when_items: The second-tier hotspot files no longer dominate the broad integration suite.
Real sync coverage remains for the cases that actually depend on derived surface updates.
